label: Biome animal record
description: Associates a PawnKindDef with a relative commonality weight for biome wild animal spawning. The XML element name is the PawnKindDef defName; scalar text is the commonality.

animal.label: Animal
animal.description: PawnKindDef of the animal. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight controlling how often this animal spawns. Populated from XML scalar text by the keyedObjectList loader.
